# Control Limits and Pause Rules

## Pause if

```text
spend > daily_cap
CPA > max_CPA after minimum sample
tracking broken
landing page down
creative disapproved
conversion quality collapses
negative sentiment spike
```

## Diagnose, do not panic, if

```text
sample too small
learning campaign intentionally negative-profit
delayed conversion window incomplete
```

## Markdown output

```text
pause_reason
evidence
restart_condition
next_fix
```
